name: Audit API Documentation for PCI-DSS Compliance
description: Automatically audits API documentation against PCI-DSS standards. Parameterized for path and version.
_migration_note: v3: Delegates to reasoning-audit-and-save fragment via core:include.

context.instruction: Audit the following API documentation for PCI-DSS {{pci_version}} compliance. Check for sensitive data exposure, improper authentication, and lack of encryption in transit.
